Tests the Math.exp function to verify that Math.exp(+0) returns 1.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.exp` function in JavaScript. It checks that the exponential function, when given a positive zero (`+0`) as input, returns the expected result of `1`. The use of the `assert` statement ensures that the test will throw an error if the condition is not met, which helps in validating the correctness of the `Math.exp` implementation. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation.
